tool_args.label: Debt Service Calculation Note (1)
tool_args.raw_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.

payload.claim_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.
payload.description: Note (1) explaining that forecasted debt service represents projected deposits, not actual payments to bondholders.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Calendarization of Debt Service Deposits Note (2)
tool_args.raw_text: Generally, the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12. Month to month variations ("timing differences") on the existing debt portfolio can occur based upon, among other things... (a) timing of income from securities, (b) variable rate differences, (c) swap transaction differences, (d) commercial paper maturity differences.

payload.claim_text: Generally, the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12.
payload.description: Note (2) explaining calendarization methodology and sources of month-to-month timing differences in debt service deposits.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Generally, the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12.

tool_args.label: Debt Service Allocation Note (3)
tool_args.raw_text: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.

payload.claim_text: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.
payload.description: Note (3) explaining how debt service is allocated across MTA agencies.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.

tool_args.label: Rounding Note
tool_args.raw_text: Totals may not add due to rounding.

payload.claim_text: Totals may not add due to rounding.
payload.description: Note that totals in tables may not sum exactly due to rounding.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Totals may not add due to rounding.
